criteriaResults.criterion: Invite Member button visible above team grid
criteriaResults.evidence: Button rendered in Team.tsx with proper positioning, E2E test passed

criteriaResults.criterion: Clicking button opens modal with email input field
criteriaResults.evidence: Modal state management working, InviteModal renders on button click, E2E test passed
Placeholder 'colleague@company.com' set on input, E2E test verified
isValidEmail function checks for @, ., and non-empty string, E2E test verified all validation cases

criteriaResults.criterion: Invalid email shows error styling on input
criteriaResults.evidence: Error prop passed to Input when invalid and touched, aria-invalid attribute set, E2E test verified

criteriaResults.criterion: Submit button disabled for invalid or empty email
criteriaResults.evidence: Button disabled={!valid} prop, E2E test verified disabled states for empty/invalid emails

criteriaResults.criterion: Submitting valid email shows success toast: Invite sent to [email]!
criteriaResults.evidence: Toast message format matches spec exactly, E2E test verified toast content
Modal state set to false in submit handler, E2E test verified modal closes

criteriaResults.criterion: Cancel button closes modal without action
criteriaResults.evidence: Cancel button calls onClose, no toast shown, E2E test verified

criteriaResults.criterion: No actual member is added (UI demonstration only)
criteriaResults.evidence: Submit handler only shows toast, no data mutation, mock data still has 8 members
useEffect resets email and touched state on isOpen change, E2E test verified

criteriaResults.criterion: Required Check - Smoke: App loads without errors
criteriaResults.evidence: All smoke tests passed, no console errors

e2eResults.notes: 8 failures in task-7.1-validation.spec.ts are pre-existing (wrong port configuration), not caused by Task 16. Confirmed in Task 15 validation report.

handoff.handoffNotes: All acceptance criteria verified and passing. Implementation follows project patterns with proper TypeScript types, form validation UX, Modal compound pattern, and comprehensive E2E test coverage. All 7 new E2E tests pass. No regressions introduced. UI demonstration correctly shows invite flow without modifying data. Production-ready.
